title: cartrema marginata var. longissima
intro: Cartrema marginata var. longissima, also known as 'long-leaved Cartrema', is a plant species within the family Rutaceae, native to tropical regions. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant's extracts and oils have been found to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and improving skin health. Cartrema marginata var. longissima can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, infusions, and topical applications, although its use and availability may vary.
